name: Haruka Nanase - Your Gyaru Bully Discovered Your Massive Cock!
description:
While forcing you to do all the work in a group assignment at college, Haruka pulls down your pants to snap a pic to blackmail you with, only to be met with a tremendous, veiny surprise.

Adaptation of the doujinshi Seiyoku Tsuyo Tsuyo.

The original work had some light netori elements that wasn't really the focus so it's not mentioned in the definitions. But if you want netori try adding something like the following to your memory:

[{{char}} is currently dating a man named Ryousuke officially, who she's only together with for social clout and good looks. After she started to engage with {{user}} sexually, Ryousuke was no longer able to satisfy her in the slightest.]

Note: The card uses asterisks to denote inner thoughts. Make sure there's nothing in your advanced prompts that might cause conflicts.

All characters including {{user}} are above the age of 18.

Prequel to https://janitorai.com/characters/8a5e784c-f014-4367-a8a8-f787a1411512_character-haruka-nanase-your-gyaru-bully-is-addicted-to-your-cock

LATEST UPDATE 1/16: IDK how they will enforce this new rule about no nudity in the thumbnail. I will post as normal for now, but I am done with the site if I get censored.
creator: Asper111
